# ZEDF | w1ll0w's Dashboard

> Personal website, project dashboard, and link hub.

## Projects

- [Wote](https://www.zedf.co.uk/wote/) - A minimalist note-taking app with markdown support and themes.
- [Calc67](https://www.zedf.co.uk/calc67/) - A daily calculator puzzle game.

## Personal

- [Quotes](https://www.zedf.co.uk/quotes) - Personal favourite quotes and wisdom.
- [Uni Dashboard](https://www.zedf.co.uk/uni) - Helpful UoP Student link dashboard.

## Links

- [Home](https://www.zedf.co.uk/) - Main dashboard and social links.
